<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  type 'a elt
  type 'a attrib
  val icon :
    string list ->
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Icons.S.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Icons.S.elt
  val user :
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Icons.S.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Icons.S.elt
  val plus :
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Icons.S.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Icons.S.elt
  val spinner :
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Icons.S.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Icons.S.elt
  val shutdown :
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Icons.S.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Icons.S.elt
  val config :
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Icons.S.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Icons.S.elt
  val signout :
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Icons.S.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Icons.S.elt
  val close :
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Icons.S.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Icons.S.elt
  val question :
    ?a:Html_types.i_attrib Icons.S.attrib list ->
    unit -> [> Html_types.i ] Icons.S.elt
end >>
